deepseek/deepseek-v4-pro.description: Flagship model with 1.6T total parameters (49B active). Rivals top closed-source models in agentic coding, world knowledge, and reasoning.
deepseek/deepseek-v4-pro.notes: Supports both thinking and non-thinking modes.

deepseek/deepseek-v4-flash.description: Fast, efficient, cost-effective model with 284B total parameters (13B active).
deepseek/deepseek-v4-flash.notes: Supports both thinking and non-thinking modes.

deepseek/deepseek-v3.2.description: Balances reasoning capability with output length. First DeepSeek model to integrate thinking with tool calling.
deepseek/deepseek-v3.2.notes: Replaced by V4 models in API. Available for legacy use.

deepseek/deepseek-v3.1.description: Hybrid reasoning architecture supporting both thinking and non-thinking modes.
deepseek/deepseek-v3.1.notes: Replaced by V4 models in API. Available for legacy use.

deepseek/deepseek-r1.description: Reasoning-focused model. Precursor to V3.1 and V4 thinking capabilities.
deepseek/deepseek-r1.notes: Legacy model. Superseded by V3.1-Think and V4 models.

deepseek/deepseek-v3.notes: Legacy model. Superseded by V3.1, V3.2, and V4.

deepseek-chat.description: Web and mobile chat interface. Free with no ads. Currently uses V4 models internally.
deepseek-chat.notes: Legacy deepseek-chat API name is deprecated; refer to official docs for migration.

deepseek-reasoner.description: Reasoning-enhanced chat mode with thinking capabilities. Currently uses V4 models in thinking mode.
deepseek-reasoner.notes: Legacy deepseek-reasoner API name is deprecated; refer to official docs for migration.

expert-mode.description: UI mode on web/app for advanced reasoning and complex tasks.

instant-mode.description: UI mode on web/app for faster, more concise responses.

image-recognition.description: Vision capabilities for image understanding in web/app.

context-caching.description: Reduced pricing for cached input tokens (API only).

function-calling.description: Tool calling support with strict mode (API only).

fill-in-the-middle.description: FIM completion beta – non-thinking mode only (API only).

plans.notes: Completely free on web and app with no ads. No paid consumer plans available.
Usage-based pricing billed per token. New accounts receive 5M free tokens without credit card.

models.notes: Supports 1M context window. Peak pricing doubles during high-traffic periods (9:00-12:00 and 14:00-18:00 Beijing time).
Supports 1M context window. Peak pricing doubles during high-traffic periods.

contextCaching.description: Cache-hit pricing is approximately 0.83% of the standard input token price.
contextCaching.details: V4 Pro: $0.003625/MTok cache hit vs $0.435/MTok cache miss. V4 Flash: $0.0028/MTok cache hit vs $0.14/MTok cache miss.

peakPricing.description: Peak hours: 9:00-12:00 and 14:00-18:00 Beijing time (effective July 2026).

apiPricing.notes: All prices in USD per 1M tokens. V4 models support 1M context. Legacy deepseek-chat and deepseek-reasoner API names are deprecated; consult official documentation for sunset dates.

notes: DeepSeek offers free web and app chat with no paid consumer plans. API is pay-as-you-go with competitive pricing. V4 series (Pro and Flash) are the current flagship models with 1M context. Legacy V3 models remain available but are being phased out.
